
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

proj_root <- if (file.exists("config/experiments.R")) {
  normalizePath(".")
} else if (file.exists("../config/experiments.R")) {
  normalizePath("..")
} else {
  stop("Run Quarto from proxy-cfr-comparison/ or analysis/")
}

source(file.path(proj_root, "R", "load_project.R"))
library(ggplot2)

quick_run <- params$quick_run
overwrite_cfr <- params$overwrite_cfr
```
